點解金色奇異果會比綠色奇異果多維他命C嫁？

replies.msg:
（利申唔識）
金色奇異果（Actinidia chinensis）同綠色奇異果（Actinidia deliciosa）係兩個品種
而金色奇異果嘅品種本身維他命C含量高啲 而且可以培植到特別多維他命C

Source
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00394-018-1627-z
The geographic range, the diversity of the wild population and subsequent development of cultivars, including gold and red-fleshed varieties, indicate that the gene pool, mostly sourced from wild types in China, offers many opportunities for breeding programmes for many desirable attributes, including very high levels of vitamin C [5, 9].


https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/9780470168011.ch1
Selection for high Vitamin C in new cultivars should be feasible as, at least in A. chinensis, ascorbate content had a high heritability (Cheng et al. 2005)
